question: Is 100k always better than 50k regardless of encoding?
notes: Per-example validation predictions were not persisted, so exact-IC50 rank correlation and <=500 nM accuracy cannot be recomputed from this experiment.
100k helps A03 on broad biologic behavior, especially for log10.
A07 is mixed: 50k log10 had better validation loss and SLL/NFL ratios than 100k log10, while 100k mhcflurry beat 50k mhcflurry.
